roa.docketEntryComment: MOT TO RETRIEVE SUBPOENAED RECORDS FILED
PEOPLE'S OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO SUPPRESS FILED
PITCHESS IN CAMERA CONDUCTED BY JUDGE BRADSTREET, REPORTER RHONDA FUNG
PD'S PC1538,5 MOTION FILED
DA'S MOTS TO AMEND COMPLAINT & ALFORD-PITCHESS FILED
DEFT'S EC1043 PITCHESS MOT FILED
PD MOT TO COMPEL DISCOVERY FILED TODAY IN RM 101

/CAL:TO SET OR DISPO/CONTD PTD ELIG RPT/GTWM/X:COUNT 001 CHARGING 487(C)PC-M IS REFERRED TO PRETRIAL DIVERSION FORAN ELIGIBILITY REPORT,/DOPU:PTD/PTDIV:02-22-12/CONT/DEF:TO COMPLETE 15 HOURS OF COMMUNITY SERVICE,/X:GOOD CAUSE IS STIPULATED/
/CAL:TRIAL & MOTION TO SUPPRESS/DAWT/X:PEOPLE'S OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO SUPPRESS FILED,/STIPLD:12-20-11/CONTD:TRIAL & MOTION TO SUPPRESS/DEF:IS PLACED ON 1 HOUR STANDBY/

/DAWT/CAL:DA ALFORD-PITCHESS MOTION; DEFENSE'S 1043EC (PITCHESS) MOTION; AND MTSEVIDENCE/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:DA ALFORD-PITCHESS MOTION ONLY, MOVING PARTY (DISTRICT ATTORNEY) NOT PRESENT/X:RONNIE WAGNER  APPEARED FOR THE SAN FRANCISCO POLICE LEGAL DEPT,/X:PITCHESS STIPULATION SIGNED AND FILED, PARTIES AGREE TO COMPLIANCE DATE OF 11-03-11 FOR POLICE LEGAL TO DELIVER RELEVANT MATERIAL TO COURT FOR REVIEW AND 11-17-11 FOR MATERIALS IF ANY TO BE PROVIDED TO DEFENSE,/
/CAL: STATUS OF PITCHESS MOTION & DA MOTION TO AMEND COMPLAINT/DAWT/AMEND: 1/AMENDCOM: COUNT 1 AS PC 487(C)-MISD INSTEAD OF PC 487(A)-MISD/FAWA/CONTD: TO SET TRIAL/DOPC/
/CAL:PTD PROG RPT/DAWT/X:COURT FINDS DIVERSION HAS BEEN SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETED, THEREFORE THE CHARGES ARE DISMISSED PURSUANT TO 1001,7 AND 1001,9 PC,
/CAL:PTD ELIG REPORT/DAWT/CONTD PTD PROG RPT/CGTW/NGWD1:001/PTD:001/CPSS/PROGPTD:03-15-12/CONTD:PRETRIAL DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/DOPU:PTD/
/CAL:TO RESET TRIAL/DAWT/DEF:IS ON 1 HR STANDBY/CONTD:TO SET OR DISPO/DOPC/
/CAL:PD MOTION TO RETRIEVE SUBPOENA/DAWT/X:RECORDS RELEASED TO DEFENSE/X:TORESET DATE IS CONFIRMED/
/CAL:TRIAL AND MOTION TO SUPPRESS/DAWT/GTWM/CONTD:TO RE-SET TRIAL/DAWF/
/CAL:TO SET TRIAL AND MOTION TO SUPPRESS/DAWT/NTW/LD:12-08-11/CONTD:TRIALAND MOTION TO SUPPRESS/
/CAL:TO SET TRIAL/CONTD:TO SET TRIAL & MTS/DAWF/
/CONTD:STATUS OF PITCHESS/DAWF/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/GTWM/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOP/
